1.Title: The Genius's Follower
1.Description: The equipper's Impact increases by <color=#2BAD00>30</color>, and their DMG ignores <color=#2BAD00>15%</color> of the target's <color=#FF5521>Fire RES</color>. When the equipper is not the active character, Energy Regen increases by <color=#2BAD00>0.4</color>/s. When the equipper deals <color=#FF5521>Fire DMG</color> with an <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, all Agents' DMG increases by <color=#2BAD00>12.5%</color> for 30s, stacking up to 2 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration. This effect can trigger once per skill. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.
